center.name: 巴拉那州
center.summary: 巴拉那州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联35种鸟类，包括孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍、Long-tailed potoo等35种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in eastern Brazil from Pernambuco south to eastern Paraná. The black-capped becard primarily inhabits the interior of terra firme forest and mature secondary forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate is found somewhat more nearly continuously from Espírito Santo south to Paraná. There are also scattered records outside these core ranges. It is a bird of the Atlantic Forest, where it inhabits primary and secondary forest, cocoa plantations with a forest overcover, and clearings with some trees. "There is some evidence that the species may be associated with a single species of tall, fine-leafed leguminous tree, which is widespread and locally common, and often supports the clumps of mistletoe on which it primarily feeds." In elevation it is almost always found below

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The campo miner is found in south-central Brazil, in an area roughly bounded by the states of Mato Grosso, Bahia, and Paraná, and in northeastern Santa Cruz Department in Bolivia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The crescent-chested puffbird's nominate subspecies is found in southeastern Brazil from Bahia and Minas Gerais south to Paraná and Santa Catarina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The freckle-breasted thornbird is found in northern Argentina between the provinces of Formosa and Buenos Aires, in Brazil from Paraná state south, and in most of Uruguay. It possibly also occurs in Parguay; the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society has only sight records from that country and so treats it as hypothetical there. The species inhabits a variety of landscapes, almost always near water

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The helmeted woodpecker is found in the southern Brazilian states of São Paulo, Paraná, and Santa Catarina, and possibly formerly in Rio Grande do Sul

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The henna-capped foliage-gleaner is found in south-central Brazil between the states of Mato Grosso, Bahia, and Paraná and into eastern Paraguay's San Pedro Department

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of long-tailed potoo is found in far northeastern Argentina, southeastern Paraguay, and southeastern Brazil approximately from Minas Gerais and southern Bahia south to Paraná

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The long-tufted screech owl is found in the southeastern Brazilian states of Paraná, Santa Catarina, and Rio Grande do Sul, in Misiones Province of northeastern Argentina, and in adjoining northern Uruguay

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Until recently it was generally believed to be restricted to about two dozen sites in the eastern part of Paraná and Rio Grande do Sul, but has now been discovered in the highlands of Minas Gerais – far north of its previously known range. It occurs in seasonally flooded grassland in the floodplains of rivers

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pallid spinetail is found in southeastern Brazil from southern Goiás, central Minas Gerais, and southeastern Bahia south into eastern Paraná

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The planalto foliage-gleaner is found in the southern planalto from Brazil's Mato Grosso state east to Bahia and south to Paraná and eastern Paraguay's Concepción and Amambay departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rufous-backed antvireo is native to the Serra do Mar coastal forests, primarily between Rio de Janeiro and Paraná states. Since 2013 there have been scattered records from further south in Santa Catarina.Kohler, G.U

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Venezuela it is usually found in areas of sandy soil; in southeastern Brazil's Paraná state it occurs in gallery forest, and in upper Amazonia it shuns igapó forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Serra do Mar tyrant-manakin is found in coastal southeastern Brazil from east-central Minas Gerais and Rio de Janeiro state south at least to far southern São Paulo state and possibly beyond into Paraná

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The squamate antbird is found in eastern Brazil from southern São Paulo state south to northern Rio Grande do Sul. There is also one record from Iguaçu National Park in western Paraná.Straube, F.C., Urben-Filho, A

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The star-throated antwren is found in coastal southeastern Brazil from southeastern Bahia south into northeastern Rio Grande do Sul and inland to western Paraná

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The striolated tit-spinetail is found in much of the southern Brazilian states of Paraná and Santa Catarina, and somewhat into northern Rio Grande do Sul

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Endemic to southeastern Brazil, the three-toed jacamar is found in drier parts of the Atlantic Forest. It is now restricted to the states of Rio de Janeiro (primarily in the Paraíba do Sul valley) and eastern Minas Gerais, though populations also formerly existed in the states of Espírito Santo, São Paulo and Paraná

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It also occurs in the ecotone between cerrado and secondary forest in Minas Gerais and in Araucaria forest in Paraná, but always in association with bamboo

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-breasted tapaculo is found in Brazilian states from eastern Bahia south to northeastern Rio Grande do Sul, including western Paraná and eastern Santa Catarina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-rumped monjita is found in Brazil from the lower Amazon River in Pará and Maranhão south to Paraná and occasionally beyond, and west to southern Mato Grosso and Mato Grosso do Sul

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-lored tody-flycatcher is found in southeastern Brazil from southeastern Bahia south to far northeastern Rio Grande do Sul and inland into Minas Gerais and northern Paraná

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Its range in Brazil is roughly bounded on the east by western Minas Gerais, Paraná, Santa Catarina, and Rio Grande do Sul. It has also been recorded as a vagrant in Chile, French Guiana, and VenezuelaRemsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in southeastern Bahia, eastern Minas Gerais, Espírito Santo, Rio de Janeiro, São Paulo, eastern Mato Grosso do Sul, Paraná, Santa Catarina, and northern Rio Grande do Sul states

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The dusky-throated hermit is found in southeastern Brazil, mostly from southern Minas Gerais and Espírito Santo south to Santa Catarina, and also in the Iguazu Falls area of western Paraná

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It has a disjunct range, being found in the coastal mountains near the border between Minas Gerais and Rio de Janeiro and in the highlands from southern Paraná south through eastern São Paulo down to northeastern Rio Grande do Sul

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Native flocks exist in Brazil; Colombia; French Guiana; Guyana; Suriname; and Venezuela, as well as the islands of the Netherlands Antilles, and Trinidad and Tobago. Flocks gather in wetlands and other marshy habitats, including mud flats, shoreline and rainforest. Outlying colonies have been identified in the coastal areas of the states of Espírito Santo, Rio de Janeiro, São Paulo (for example in the Santos-Cubatão mangroves of the Baixada Santista district), Paraná and Santa Catarina. In recent years, bird colonies can be seen as far south as in the coastal areas of Joinville and the island of São Francisco do Sul. The highest concentrations are found in the Llanos region of western Venezuela and eastern Colombia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: lactea is found in eastern Brazil from Bahia south through Minas Gerais, Rio de Janeiro, and São Paulo into Paraná

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: pucherani of glittering-bellied emerald is found in eastern Brazil from Maranhão and Ceará all the way south to Paraná

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The azure jay is found in Brazil from southern São Paulo south through Paraná, Santa Catarina, and Rio Grande do Sul almost to Uruguay. Its range continues into the northeastern Argentinian provinces of Formosa, Chaco, Corrientes, and Misiones.{{cite book | last =de la Peña | first =Martín R

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The planalto slaty antshrike is found in central and eastern Brazil in a wide swath from eastern Maranhão, Ceará, and Paraíba southwest to northern Mato Grosso do Sul, extreme northern Paraná, and western São Paulo

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: noctivagus, the nominate race, occurs in southeastern Brazil: Minas Gerais (Doce River area), southern Bahia, Espírito Santo, Rio de Janeiro, São Paulo, Paraná, Santa Catarina, and Rio Grande do Sul. * C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Brazil's Paraná, Santa Catarina, and Rio Grande do Sul states, in Uruguay, and in northeastern Argentina south to northeastern Buenos Aires Province.{{cite book | last =de la Peña | first =Martín R

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: wiedii, southeastern Brazil south of the nominate to eastern Paraná and Santa Catarina The species inhabits a wide variety of semi-open landscapes including edges and clearings in wet and sand-ridge forests, secondary forest, woodlands, cerrado, gallery forest in savanna, and plantations of fruit trees like papaya
